summary: Realtime Firestore listener hook that subscribes to vendor_locations/{vendorID}/locations and returns the list of service locations (sedes). Used by WizardStepLocations to display existing coverage zones and track step completion (>= 1 location).

businessIntent.problem: The locations wizard step needs to display existing service locations in realtime so the carrier admin can see registered zones and know the step is complete.
businessIntent.expectedOutcome: Hook subscribes to vendor_locations/{vendorID}/locations and returns { locations, loading, error }. Cleanup on unmount is guaranteed.

selectedBuildingBlocks.name: realtime-firestore-listener
selectedBuildingBlocks.reason: Hook uses onSnapshot on vendor_locations subcollection — requires listener cleanup pattern

selectedBuildingBlocks.name: hook-service-pattern
selectedBuildingBlocks.reason: Standard { data, loading, error } return contract used across all carrier hooks

selectedBuildingBlocks.name: loading-empty-error-state
selectedBuildingBlocks.reason: Must handle loading:true initially, empty array when no locations, and Firestore error state

existingPatternsToFollow: collection(db, 'vendor_locations', vendorID, 'locations') for the subcollection path
onSnapshot returns unsubscribe — return it from useEffect cleanup
setLoading(false) in both onSnapshot callback and error callback
IMPORT DEPTH FOR HOOK FILE (src/carrier/hooks/useVendorLocations.ts): use '../../core/firebase/config' and '../../core/onboarding/hooks/useAuth'

IMPORT DEPTH FOR TEST FILE (src/carrier/hooks/__tests__/useVendorLocations.test.ts): use '../../../core/firebase/config' and '../../../core/onboarding/hooks/useAuth' — the __tests__ subfolder adds one extra level
knownAntiPatternsToAvoid: Collection is vendor_locations (plural with S) — never vendor_location
Do not query the parent vendor_locations/{vendorID} doc — locations live in the subcollection
Do not flatten the nested location field — preserve location.location.lat/lng shape as stored
Do not use getDocs — this must be a realtime onSnapshot listener
TEST IMPORT PATH: never use '../../core/firebase/config' in the test file — tests live in __tests__/ so the path must be '../../../core/firebase/config' (3 levels up)

create.description: Realtime onSnapshot hook for vendor_locations/{vendorID}/locations. Returns { locations, loading, error } and cleans up listener on unmount.
Jest tests: loading:true initially, locations populated from snapshot, empty array on empty collection, unsubscribe called on unmount.

hookSpec.returnShape: { locations: any[], loading: boolean, error: Error | null }

dataModelsTouched.notes: Path: vendor_locations/{vendorID}/locations. Key fields: locationID, vendorID, name, address, location.location.lat, location.location.lng, maxDistanceService, status.

failureEscalationRules: If onSnapshot mock fails: reload realtime-firestore-listener building block and regenerate test
If import path fails: reload project-structure-imports and verify src/core/firebase/config path

steps: Produce handoff package for Claude Code integration

claudeCodeIntegrationPlan.reason: Factory output is an integration candidate only — Claude Code copies files into production repo and validates.

acceptanceCriteria: Hook subscribes to vendor_locations/{vendorID}/locations via onSnapshot
loading is true on initial render, false after first snapshot
locations is an empty array when the collection has no documents
